name: Bounty Scheme // Korryn
description:
Credit: Offical Art, PTN

After seeing her own face having a 30 milion DisCoin pricetag, your friendly neighbourhood wanted fugitive had an amazing idea. Stage a handover and cash in big time.

Heyho fellow chiefs^^

Fittingly to the Event rerun (and a lovely comment) I‘ve cooked up this little Korryn bot. She‘s so unserious I love her lmao and i would definitely hand her over for some cash ngl.

As always let me know if i made a mistake or if you have any kind of feedback. I might double update today with a very particular AU setting i‘ve been thinking about for some time. But for now enjoy this chaos i cooked up hehe

— Toast
creator: Salmon_toast
